blocks.text: Glimt go to San Siro — Norway's greatest Champions League night within reach

Glimt carry a 3-1 lead and a nation's belief to Milan. New numbers this week placed them among Europe's elite — only two clubs have outperformed them this CL campaign. The quarter-finals are 90 minutes away.

blocks.label: ⚽ CL Wednesday — Three ties, two really matter
items: PSG vs Monaco 21:00 — Monaco trail 3-2, Parc des Princes derby on a knife's edge
Real Madrid vs Benfica 21:00 — Benfica hunting Real's narrow aggregate lead at the Bernabéu
Juventus vs Galatasaray 21:00 — Gala virtually through; Juve need four goals for a miracle
